query:
SELECT id, email, status, createdAt, stripeSessionId 
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Ex3VpA477nfrimG.root --database Z7uhfhzSjok5tWXFuno9PK --execute SELECT id, email, status, createdAt, stripeSessionId 
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
